tasks.title: Power Steering SVs at Listen Layer: Jacobian SV x AND-frac correlation
tasks.definition_of_done: Compute top Jacobian SV (J_{L*->final}) for Whisper-base on L2-ARCTIC samples; SV direction correlates with AND-frac gradient r>0.4; power steering at L* increases AND-frac >=0.05 for accented samples; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Schmidt Sciences RFP 2026: Proposal Outline (deadline May 26)
tasks.definition_of_done: Outline saved to pitches/schmidt-rfp-outline.md: AND-frac (detection) + Power Steering (mitigation) for audio deceptive behavior. 400+ words. Deadline May 26 noted.

tasks.title: AND-frac as ASR confidence calibration signal
tasks.definition_of_done: Build calibration harness: AND-frac at L* vs WER per segment on LibriSpeech-clean subset (CPU); Pearson r > 0.4 vs WER; compare vs temperature scaling; plot ECE curve; <5min CPU

tasks.title: Commitment head entropy: hallucination early-warning monitor
tasks.definition_of_done: Script that tracks commitment head entropy across Whisper decoding steps; entropy spike (>2σ) precedes hallucination in ≥60% of samples on L2-ARCTIC mock; CPU <5min

tasks.title: JALMBench v0: audio jailbreak micro-benchmark (50 prompts)
tasks.definition_of_done: 50 synthetic adversarial prompts × 3 categories (instruction-override, roleplay, payload-split); AND-frac detection AUROC >0.85; saved to experiments/jalmBench_v0.py; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Whisper hallucination prediction via pre-generation AND-frac
tasks.definition_of_done: Compute AND-frac at L* before decoding for 60 L2-ARCTIC samples; correlate with ground-truth hallucination labels; AUROC >0.70; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Power steering multi-variety accent normalization (10 accent groups)
tasks.definition_of_done: Extend Q182: run power steering at L* for all 10 L1-accent groups in L2-ARCTIC; WER-proxy improvement ≥0.04 AND-frac gain for ≥8/10 groups; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac drift monitor during Whisper fine-tuning (mock)
tasks.definition_of_done: Simulate fine-tuning updates via gradient steps on mock data; track AND-frac at L* every 5 steps; detect collapse threshold; output alert when AND-frac drops >0.3; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac in GPT-2-small: text LLM cross-modal replication
tasks.definition_of_done: Compute attention AND-gate pattern in GPT-2-small on WikiText-103 samples (100); find L* analog; compare curve shape to Whisper AND-frac; CPU <5min; novelty: first cross-modal AND-frac report

tasks.title: AND-frac unified interpretability paper: NeurIPS workshop draft
tasks.definition_of_done: Synthesize Q162-Q182 artifacts into draft paper: AND-frac = commitment mechanism = unified hallucination+jailbreak theory; 4 sections (intro/method/results/discussion); 1500+ words; saved to pitches/andfrac-unified-paper.md
